title: Test Config
description: Configuration for a red-team test run. Stored as JSONB in redteam_tests.config. Identity and reference fields (id, test_name, sbom_id, policy_id) are promoted Postgres columns on redteam_tests and are NOT repeated here.

profile.description: 'ci' disables PersistenceAgent, simulation mode, 10-min timeout. 'full' enables all 5 agents.

confirm.description: Must be true when mode='real'. Prevents accidental real execution.

scenarios.description: Restrict to specific scenario types. Empty array means all types are run.

min_impact_score.description: Only execute scenarios with pre-score >= this value.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock time for the test. Default 600s (10 min) for CI profile.
